questions.question: Consider a problem with a time constraint of 8 hours. Find the optimal time allocation that maximizes productivity, given that the individual has two tasks that require 3 hours and 4 hours of effort respectively. What is the optimal time allocation?
questions.hint: Use the concept of linear programming to solve this problem

questions.question: You have 8 hours to complete a project, and you need to allocate your time between two tasks: Task A, which requires 4 hours of effort, and Task B, which requires 2 hours of effort. If you allocate 60% of your time to Task A, how many hours will you work on Task B?
questions.hint: Use the concept of percentages to solve this problem

questions.question: Suppose you have 8 hours available to study for an exam, and you want to allocate your time equally between two subjects: Mathematics and Physics. If each subject requires 3 hours of study, how many hours will you study each subject?
questions.hint: Use simple division to solve this problem
